cases.prompt: Convert scenario checkout.duplicate-submit from web-ux-test/plan.yaml into a Playwright CLI regression test under tests/e2e.
cases.expected_output: A deterministic Playwright test with setup assumptions, stable locators, explicit assertions, and a command to run it.
assertions: Avoids arbitrary waits and pixel coordinates.

cases.prompt: Turn this confirmed modal focus-trap finding into a regression test. Auth should use a test user fixture, not manual login.
cases.expected_output: A focused Playwright CLI regression test or test outline that uses deterministic auth setup and asserts focus behavior.
assertions: Uses role or label locators where possible.
Includes fixture and test data assumptions.
Does not depend on production data.

cases.prompt: Explore this app with Playwright MCP and tell me what breaks.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger; exploratory execution belongs to browser testing or plan execution workflows.
assertions: Does not use this skill for open-ended exploratory browser testing.
